sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92348" key="r(hsi/arxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥησί-αρχος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥησός· ἀρχός</foreign>, <sense id="n92348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥησός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
